metadata.description: A2 — Long-running launch mission with a phase clock anchored to scheduled_publish_at. Phases: T-72h asset prep, T-24h founder approval, T-0 synchronized publish, T+0..72h response monitor, T+7d lessons writeback.
metadata.product_scoping: product_id required; all rows scoped per-product

phases.description: T-72h: Draft all channel content using LLM-bound verbs, inject prior launch lessons.

steps.title: Inject prior launch lessons into mission context
steps.description: Pull mission_lessons with domain=launch_* for this product. Inject into mission context so T-72h drafts benefit from prior launch data.

steps.title: Draft Hacker News launch post
steps.description: Enqueue LLM draft for HN Show HN post. Consumes spec + brand voice + prior launch lessons.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: launch_drafts/hn. Enqueues Beckman OVERHEAD task.

steps.title: Draft Product Hunt launch post
steps.description: Enqueue LLM draft for Product Hunt launch page (tagline + features + maker comment).

steps.title: Draft Twitter/X launch thread
steps.description: Enqueue LLM draft for Twitter launch thread (founder-voice, 3-5 tweets).

steps.title: Draft LinkedIn launch post
steps.description: Enqueue LLM draft for LinkedIn professional launch post.

steps.title: Draft Reddit launch post
steps.description: Enqueue LLM draft for Reddit subreddit post (community-native, no hard sell).

phases.description: T-24h: Founder reviews and approves all channel drafts. One founder_action card per channel.

steps.title: Founder review — HN draft
steps.description: Surface HN draft as a founder_action card with inline edit-and-approve. Blocker: do NOT include in publish_synchronized without approval.

steps.title: Founder review — Product Hunt draft
steps.description: Surface PH draft as a founder_action card. Blocker: approval required before T-0.

steps.title: Founder review — Twitter draft
steps.description: Surface Twitter thread as a founder_action card. Blocker: approval required before T-0.

steps.title: Founder review — LinkedIn draft
steps.description: Surface LinkedIn post as a founder_action card. Blocker: approval required before T-0.

steps.title: Founder review — Reddit draft
steps.description: Surface Reddit post as a founder_action card. Blocker: approval required before T-0.

steps.title: Launch readiness gate (A2.r1)
steps.description: Run all 7 pre-T-0 readiness checks before authorizing publish_synchronized. Blocker on any failure. Absent subsystems degrade to non-blocking warning.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: launch_readiness_gate. 7 checks: site_load, payment_e2e, support_faq, copy_compliance, press_kit, status_page, crisis_playbook.

phases.description: T-0: Publish all approved channel drafts simultaneously. Checks B6 marketing freeze first.

steps.title: Synchronized publish — all channels
steps.description: Publish all founder-approved channel drafts simultaneously. BEFORE publishing, check is_marketing_frozen(product_id) — abort if frozen. Updates launches.status to 'live'.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: publish_synchronized. Checks B6 freeze, then publishes in parallel. Returns {status: published|aborted|partial}.

steps.title: Start launch response monitor
steps.description: Enqueue sub-mission that polls each channel for replies, comments, upvotes. Surfaces top engagement + negative-sentiment threads + velocity anomalies as founder_actions.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: launch_response_monitor. Enqueues a Beckman sub-mission (researcher agent). Poll intervals: T+1h, T+4h, T+24h, T+72h.

steps.title: T+4h engagement snapshot
steps.description: Trigger a mid-day engagement snapshot from the response monitor. Surface velocity anomalies immediately via founder_action.

steps.title: Day-1 engagement digest
steps.description: Surface day-1 engagement summary via founder_action: top threads, total reach, conversion indicators, negative-sentiment flagged threads.

steps.title: Day-3 engagement digest
steps.description: Surface day-3 engagement summary. Flag decelerating engagement. Update launches.status to 'monitoring'.

phases.description: T+7d: Write 3-5 mission_lessons rows from launch engagement data.

steps.title: Launch lessons writeback (T+7d)
steps.description: Emit 3-5 mission_lessons rows (e.g. dedup_key launch.hn.timing.9am-est). Feeds cross-mission learning loop: next launch's T-72h drafts consume these via inject_lessons. Updates launches.status to 'concluded'.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: launch_lessons_writeback. Writes mission_lessons rows for top-channel, timing, readiness patterns.

telegram.description: Create a launch mission for the product. Date is scheduled_publish_at (T-0). Channels: hn,ph,twitter,linkedin,reddit.
